creator: matt@conundrum.com
text:
> Is this during initial checkout, or an update?

As noted in the =93How To Repeat=94 section, it=92s with both.

> Please provide output from 'pkg info subversion=92.

Brand new system with a fresh ports tree:

subversion-1.8.5
Name           : subversion
Version        : 1.8.5
Origin         : devel/subversion
Architecture   : freebsd:9:x86:64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : devel
Licenses       : APACHE20
Maintainer     : lev@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : http://subversion.apache.org/
Comment        : Version control system
Options        :
	BDB            : off
	DOCS           : on
	FREEBSD_TEMPLATE: on
	GNOME_KEYRING  : off
	KDE_KWALLET    : off
	MAINTAINER_DEBUG: off
	MOD_DAV_SVN    : off
	NLS            : on
	P4_STYLE_MARKERS: on
	SASL           : off
	SERF           : on
	STATIC         : off
	SVNSERVE_WRAPPER: off
	TEST           : off
	TOOLS          : off
Shared Libs required:
	libsvn_wc-1.so.0
	libsvn_subr-1.so.0
	libsvn_repos-1.so.0

	libsvn_diff-1.so.0
	libsvn_delta-1.so.0
	libsvn_client-1.so.0
	libsqlite3.so.8
	libserf-1.so.1
	libintl.so.9
	libiconv.so.3
	libexpat.so.6
	libaprutil-1.so.5
	libapr-1.so.4
Shared Libs provided:
	libsvn_wc-1.so.0
	libsvn_subr-1.so.0
	libsvn_repos-1.so.0
	libsvn_ra_svn-1.so.0
	libsvn_ra_serf-1.so.0
	libsvn_ra_local-1.so.0
	libsvn_ra-1.so.0
	libsvn_fs_util-1.so.0
	libsvn_fs_fs-1.so.0
	libsvn_fs-1.so.0
	libsvn_diff-1.so.0
	libsvn_delta-1.so.0
	libsvn_client-1.so.0
Flat size      : 14.3MiB
Description    :
Subversion is a version control system designed to be as similar to =
cvs(1)=20
as possible, while fixing many outstanding problems with cvs(1).

WWW: http://subversion.apache.org/
